summary: 本周GitHub Trending共收录 61 个热门项目，新上榜 61 个，以Python项目为主（22个），主要集中在AI工具/LLM应用（32个）、其他（11个）方向，榜首OpenMontage作为本周开发工具/CLI方向的明星项目登顶（2938 stars），反映出开发者对AI工具和智能体的持续旺盛需求。

top_10.title: calesthio/OpenMontage
top_10.content: World's first open-source, agentic video production system. 12 pipelines, 52 tools, 500+ agent skills. Turn your AI coding assistant into a full video production studio.

top_10.title: sponsors/chopratejas
top_10.content: Compress tool outputs, logs, files, and RAG chunks before they reach the LLM. 60-95% fewer tokens, same answers. Library, proxy, MCP server.

top_10.title: sponsors/mattpocock
top_10.content: Skills for Real Engineers. Straight from my .claude directory.

top_10.content: World's first open-source, agentic video production system. 12 pipelines, 52 tools, 500+ agent skills. Turn your AI coding assistant into a full video production studio.

top_10.title: google-labs-code/design.md
top_10.content: A format specification for describing a visual identity to coding agents. DESIGN.md gives agents a persistent, structured understanding of a design system.

top_10.title: sponsors/simplex-chat
top_10.content: SimpleX - the first messaging network operating without user identifiers of any kind - 100% private by design! iOS, Android and desktop apps 📱!

top_10.title: ZhuLinsen/daily_stock_analysis
top_10.content: LLM 驱动的多市场股票智能分析系统：多源行情、实时新闻、决策看板与自动推送，支持零成本定时运行。 LLM-powered multi-market stock analysis system with multi-source market data, real-time news, decision dashboard, automated notifications, and cost-fr

top_10.title: apple/container
top_10.content: A tool for creating and running Linux containers using lightweight virtual machines on a Mac. It is written in Swift, and optimized for Apple silicon.

top_10.title: DeusData/codebase-memory-mcp
top_10.content: High-performance code intelligence MCP server. Indexes codebases into a persistent knowledge graph — average repo in milliseconds. 158 languages, sub-ms queries, 99% fewer tokens. Single static binary
